titleStmt.title: SII 26.678: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 678. (A.R. No. 633 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Rājēndradēva: Year (lost), Mithuṉa (Āṉi) ba. 13, Sunday, Aśvati. Irregular. C. 11th century.

summary.p: This inscription is built in the middle and is incomplete. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumādar puvieṉṉum, etc.

It states that the Peruṁguṟi Mahāsabhai of Pūvaikkuḍi, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, assembled in the temple of the god Śrī-Madurāntakīśvaram-uḍaiyār of the place, and decided after receiving some money (details lost) from the temple of the god Tiruguṇḍam-uḍaiyār of Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in the same nāḍu, to give away some land in the place, as tax-free gift, to provide for the feeding of the Śivajōgis in the temple.
-Madurāntaka-vadi is mentioned in connection with the specification of the boundaries of the gift-land.
It also appears to record a gift of land to the image of the god Umāskandaṉ set up in the temple of Tirunallamuḍaiya-mahādēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiru mātar puvi Eṉṉum perumātarivar māteviyarkaḷāka mitoḷi veṇkuṭai Uyarttu tiṇkali piyarttu tem muṉai Aṭutiṟaṟ coḻapāṇṭiyaṉ Eṉṟum koḻimiṉṟoṭu kaḻal viracoḻaṉaippaṭi pukaḻ karikālacoḻaṉ Eṉṟum porutoḻil vāḷ valittaṭakkai maturān=takaṉai coḻakaṅkaṉeṉṟum kaṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḻaṉai tiṉakaraṉ kulattu ciṟappamar coḻajaṉakarājaṉ Eṉṟum kaṉaikaṭalpaṭi koṇṭapaṭi pukaḻ muṭikoṇṭa coḻaṉaic cuntaracoḻaṉ Eṉṟum cen=tamiḻ piṭikaliraṭṭapāṭi koṇṭacoḻaṉai to
l puvi Āḷuṭaic coḻa kaṉṉakucciyarājaṉ Eṉṟum maṇṇutaṉ kātal kātalar tammuḷ metaku katirāṅkaṉai kaḻal maturān=takaṉai vel ceṉṟoṇṭi nalliraṭṭamaṇṭalameyti natikaḷum kāṭum patikaḷum Anekamum Aḻittaṉa vaḷavaṉ Eṉṉum moḻipporuḷ keṭṭu veka veñcaḷukki Āhavamallaṉ paripavamiḷakki teṉṟeri cinatteḻuntu cepparuntirattukkoppatta la jayaciṅkaṉum porpulakeciyuntārtanacayaṉ maṉumāṉa maṉṉavaril maṇṭalikacokaṉum Āḷavaṇpukaḻ Āḷumaṉācaṉunteṉa vāmaṭṭaviḻalaṅkal moṭṭayaṉuṅkaṭṭi manaṉaṉ ṉuḷampaṉu meṉumivar mutaliyar Eṇṇilai Araicarai viṇṇakatteṟṟi vaṉṉiyarevaṉum vayappaṭaittuttaṉuṅ ko kuṇṭamāṉu meṉṟiṉṉa veñciṉavaraicaroṭañciyac caḷukki kulakula
kulaintu nilai ttu veṉṉuṟa neḷittup piṉṉuṟa nokkikkāl paṟintoṭa melkaṭal vāytturattiya poḻutac cerukkaṉattavaṉ viṭu catturu paya kuḻāmum pāvaiyariṭṭamu meṉaimeṟavu muṉaivaiyiṟ koṇṭu vijaiya Abhiṣegam paṇṇit teṉṟicaivaiyiṟp porppaṭai naṭāttik kāṟkaṭalilaṅkaiyil māṭāp paṭaikkaviṅkar muṉ viracalāmekaṉai kaṭark kaḷiṟṟoṭum piṭittu katir ṭṭuvitte kopparakecaripanmarāṉa [ Uṭaiyār śrīrājendra] tevarkku yāṇṭu Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam pūvaikkuṭip peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom mituṉanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum triyodaśiyum peṟṟa Aśvati nāṉṟu nammūr śrīmaturāntakicśvaramuṭaiyār koyililey kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu paṇippaṇiyāṟ paṇittu Iṉṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunallattut tirukuṇṭamuṭai Uṇṇum śivajokikaḷukku Ūṭṭa veṇṭum
paṇṭārattu nāṅkaḷ ṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu śrīmaturān=takavatikku meṟku śrī coḻakeraḷavāykkālukku vaṭakku Añcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu munṟāñcaturattu ye mukkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Eḻumākkāṇikkum kiḻpāṟkellai śrīmaturān=takavatikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kaṇavativāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tirunallamuṭaiya mahādevar koyilil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum tirumeṉi Umāskantaṉ tirumeni ṉāyakaṟku muṉpu I nikkittaṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl Ittevarkke nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Iṅke nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ caturattu kaviciyaṉ tāyaṉāṉa Iṣabhavāhaṉaṉ perāl nilattukku meṟkum teṉpārkellai Amararkaṇāyakaṟku nāṅkaḷ muṉpu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilattukku nilattukkum kkum vaṭakku nalla
Digital edition of SII 26.678 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
